cheddar-broccoli-rice-cups: Flux two ramekins of cheesy rice with broccoli and pasta — reads as the dish, hero composition
cheddar-rosemary-spiralized-potato-panca: olive oil decanter with olives and lavender — completely off-topic
cheese-on-toast: closed grilled-cheese panini sandwich, not the British open-faced version
cheese-scones: pile of cheese scones with golden cheese baked on top — strong hero
cheese-scones-cheddar: same cheese-scone image with golden cheese topping — right dish
cheese-straws: Flux twisted golden pastry straws on parchment with cheese on the side — right dish, hero composition
chermoula-sea-bass: pan-seared sea bass fillet with crispy skin, with braised fennel and tomatoes in a tomato-wine sauce, side of new potatoes — reads as a cooked sea bass hero (chermoula proper would be greener but the dish concept is right)
chicken-and-dumplings: Southern-style chicken with flat pastry dumplings in cream gravy with a roll — composition is amateur but the dish is unambiguously right
chicken-chasseur: Flux chicken in mushroom-cream sauce with herbs — reads as chasseur, hero composition
chicken-fried-steak: raw ribeye steak with rosemary and spices on dark slate — not the breaded cubed-steak dish
chicken-gyoza: Flux pleated bag-dumplings (more khinkali/money-bag than gyoza) — gyoza are crescent half-moons
chicken-jalfrezi: Flux chicken parmesan over pasta — jalfrezi is a thick tomato-pepper Indian curry, not this
chicken-pot-pie: live baby chick on grass — completely off-topic
chicken-shawarma: BBQ-style spicy chicken drumsticks on a wire rack — not shawarma
chicken-tagine-with-preserved-lemon: Flux chicken with whole onions, lemon slices and golden apricot-like fruits in saffron broth — Moroccan-styled with visible lemon, reads as tagine
chicken-tikka-masala: raw chicken breasts on a white plate
chicory-pear-goats-cheese-salad: bread slices, olives and olive oil being poured — no salad
chilli-con-carne: bowl of chili with beans, corn and ground meat in red sauce — right dish, hero composition
chilli-jam: fresh whole red chilies in a bowl, not the cooked jam
chocolate-cherry-and-almond-fudge: close-up of dried dates on wood, not fudge
chocolate-hazelnut-stuffed-cookies: chocolate cookies with molten chocolate-hazelnut centers, one with a bite oozing the filling — strong hero
chocolate-mousse: ramekin of chocolate mousse with shaved chocolate on top, chocolate-bar props (slight brand-imprint on side prop but the hero dish is correct)
chocolate-overnight-oats: ramekin of chocolate overnight oats with chocolate buttons and almonds, oats scattered — right dish
chocolate-self-saucing-pudding: chocolate pudding/lava cake with vanilla ice cream and cherries, chocolate sauce drizzle — close enough to self-saucing pudding, hero composition
christmas-salmon: Christmas tablescape with various dishes, candles and evergreens — no clear salmon hero
ciabatta-high-hydration: loaf of flour-dusted ciabatta on marble — right bread, hero composition
cinder-toffee-ice-cream: vanilla ice cream with caramel sauce and toffee chunks — reads as cinder-toffee/honeycomb ice cream
cinnamon-bun-overnight-oats: chia-pudding parfaits with mango and strawberry — wrong flavor (should be cinnamon-brown swirl)
cinnamon-ice-cream: scoop of cinnamon ice cream with cinnamon sticks and dust scattered on a teal table — right dish
cinnamon-roasted-almonds: just cinnamon sticks and ground cinnamon — no almonds
cinnamon-roll-smoothie: raw rolled oats on marble — not a smoothie
